title: Alias Names
description: Use the AS keyword to give columns more descriptive temporary names in your result set.
problemStatement:
Clean results! Select the `price` column from a table named `products`, but rename the header to `unit_price` in the final output.

**Requirement:** Use the `AS` keyword.
hints: Aliases make your result set headers much easier to understand for humans.
solutionCode: SELECT price AS unit_price FROM products;
